name: Cantharidae
diagnosis: The soldier beetles (Cantharidae) are relatively soft-bodied, straight-sided beetles. They are cosmopolitan in distribution. One of the first described species has a color pattern reminiscent of the red coats of early British soldiers, hence the common name.

genus_notes.chauliognathus: Chauliognathus is a genus of soldier beetles in the family Cantharidae.
